item.title: Pork King Good, LLC: Pork King Good Onion & Sour Cream Seasoning. Net Wt. 3 oz (85G) bottle. Recall
item.product: Pork King Good Onion & Sour Cream Seasoning. Net Wt. 3 oz (85G) bottle.
item.summary: Seasoning was made with recalled California Dairies milk powder due to Salmonella contamination. Product details: Pork King Good Onion & Sour Cream Seasoning. Net Wt. 3 oz (85G) bottle. UPC 8 50008-53861 2. Made by Pork King Good, Milwaukee, WI 53110.
item.affectedPeople: AL, AZ, CA, FL, GA,IL, IN, MD, MI, MO, MS, MT, NC, ND, NE, NH, NY, OH, PA, RI, TN, TX, UT, VA, WA, WI
item.payoutAmount: Refund, replacement, correction, or disposal if stated by the official notice
